name: ridendine-agent-kit
description: RideNDine repo-local agent kit for live verification, Supabase fixture checks, and project operating rules.

interface.shortDescription: Run RideNDine live verification and fixture workflows.
interface.longDescription: RideNDine Agent Kit packages repo-specific guidance for browser feedback, Supabase fixture readiness, MCP/tool health, and agent operating rules.
interface.defaultPrompt: Verify the RideNDine change live, collect browser/API feedback, and report artifact paths.
